extract: Staraptor (Japanese: ムクホーク Mukuhawk) is a dual-type Normal/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from Staravia starting at level 34. It is the final form of Starly. Staraptor can Mega Evolve into Mega Staraptor using the Staraptite. Mega Staraptor was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
